expected_itinerary: Day 1-3: Tokyo (Senso-ji, Akihabara, Shibuya, Tsukiji Outer Market). Day 4-5: Day trip to Nikko and Kamakura. Day 6-7: Kyoto (Fushimi Inari, Arashiyama, Nishiki Market). Day 8-9: Osaka (Dotonbori, Osaka Castle). Day 10: Return flight. Budget breakdown: flights $1,200, hotels $1,800 (9 nights at $200), rail pass $280, food/activities $1,220.

Day 1-2: Buenos Aires (acclimatize, Recoleta, San Telmo). Day 3-6: El Calafate (Perito Moreno Glacier, Los Glaciares NP). Day 7-10: El Chalten (Fitz Roy trek, Laguna de los Tres). Day 11-12: Torres del Paine (W Trek start). Day 13-14: Return via Santiago. Budget is tight for 14 days including transatlantic flights. Recommend extending budget to $4,500 or reducing to 10 days.

Day 1-2: Le Marais neighborhood, Musee Picasso, Place des Vosges. Day 3: Louvre (pre-booked timed entry). Day 4: Orsay and Rodin museums, Luxembourg Gardens. Day 5: Versailles day trip. Day 6: Montmartre, Sacre-Coeur, fine dining at Le Comptoir. Day 7: Seine river cruise, departure. Budget: flights $800, hotel $2,100 (6 nights at $350), dining $1,500, museums/transport $600, contingency $1,000.

Day 1-4: Ubud (Tegallalang rice terraces, yoga retreat, Monkey Forest, cooking class). Day 5-7: Amed (snorkeling at Japanese Shipwreck, sunrise at Mount Agung viewpoint). Day 8-10: Uluwatu (Padang Padang beach, temple sunset, surf lessons). Day 11-12: Seminyak (departure prep, shopping). Budget: flights $900, accommodation $1,200, activities $600, food $500, transport $300.

Minimum expedition cruise cost is $8,000-$15,000 for basic cabin (10-12 days from Ushuaia). Budget of $8,000 does not cover Sydney-to-Ushuaia flights ($1,500-$2,000), Ushuaia hotel night, travel insurance (mandatory, $300-$500), or expedition gear. Recommend minimum total budget of $12,000.

Day 1: Reykjavik arrival. Day 2: Golden Circle (Thingvellir, Geysir, Gullfoss). Day 3: South coast (Seljalandsfoss, Skogafoss, Reynisfjara). Day 4: Glacier hike at Skaftafell, Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon. Day 5-6: East fjords, Seydisfjordur. Day 7: Myvatn area, Dimmuborgir, Myvatn Nature Baths. Day 8: Akureyri, whale watching in Husavik. Day 9: Snaefellsnes peninsula. Day 10: Blue Lagoon, departure. Budget: flights $600, rental car $900, fuel $300, accommodation $1,600, food $800, activities $800.

Day 1: Arrive, settle in El Poblado, Comuna 13 street art tour. Day 2: Coffee axis day trip to Jardin. Day 3: Guatape day trip (El Penol rock). Day 4: City tour (Botero Plaza, Parque Arvi by metrocable). Day 5: Salsa class, nightlife in Parque Lleras. Day 6: Santa Elena silletero flower farms. Day 7: Departure. Budget: flights $350, accommodation $420, food $350, activities $400, transport $180, contingency $100.

Day 1-2: Marrakech (Jemaa el-Fnaa, Majorelle Garden, Bahia Palace, souk exploration). Day 3: Atlas Mountains day trip, Berber village lunch. Day 4: Drive to Ouarzazate via Tizi n Tichka pass, Ait Benhaddou kasbah. Day 5: Todra Gorge. Day 6-7: Merzouga, camel trek into Erg Chebbi, overnight desert camp. Day 8: Return to Marrakech via Dades Valley. Day 9: Essaouira day trip. Day 10: Departure. Budget per person: flights $700, riads $600, desert tour $300, food $400, transport $700, activities $500.

Bhutan requires a Sustainable Development Fee of $200/day for international tourists. A 7-day trip incurs $1,400 in SDF alone, plus $150-$250/day for accommodation, meals, guide, and transport (mandatory licensed tour operator). Minimum 7-day cost approximately $3,200-$4,150 excluding flights ($800-$1,200 Seattle to Paro via Delhi or Bangkok). Budget of $3,000 is insufficient.

Day 1: Arrive San Jose, transfer to Arenal. Day 2: Arenal Volcano hikes, Tabacon hot springs. Day 3: Zip-lining and hanging bridges in Monteverde. Day 4: Transfer to Manuel Antonio. Day 5: Manuel Antonio NP (wildlife, beaches). Day 6: Surf lesson at Playa Dominical. Day 7: Drake Bay transfer, snorkeling at Cano Island. Day 8: Return to San Jose, departure. Budget: flights $400, accommodation $1,050, rental car $420, activities $600, food $330.
